title: Hassett Green London - Strawberry - Fragrance Oil Reed Diffuser Refill - Larger Size 250ml Bottle
features: Hassett Green's Fragrance Oil Reed Diffuser Refill can be used with traditional rattan or fibre reed diffusers as an elegant way to fragrance your home and create the perfect ambiance
A sweet, fruity strawberry fragrance with notes of strawberry, cranberry and rhubarb lifted by soft floral nuances
The perfect gift idea to give or receive, ideal for birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, new homes & more
100% alcohol free for a longer lasting fragrance. Large size 250ml recyclable bottle (made with post-consumer waste)
Vegan friendly and proudly made in the UK
description: Product description Hassett Green's Fragrance Oil Reed Diffuser Refill can be used with traditional rattan or fibre reed diffusers as well as ultrasonic diffusers, as an elegant way to fragrance your home and create the perfect ambiance. Replenish your diffuser more than twice with this large size 250 millilitre refill bottle. Simply pour into your existing diffuser bottle and arrange reeds inside for an instant fragrance. On the first day of use we suggest that you turn the sticks 2-3 times for maximum performance. Also ensure that you place the reed diffuser in a warm environment with good airflow for the best results. Reeds will naturally soak up the oil and release fragrance into the air. To control the scent, add or remove some of the reeds to adjust to your taste. When the strength of the fragrance begins to weaken, turn the reeds upside down periodically or replace them with new ones. Plastic bottle is made with 30% post-consumer waste. Directions Pour into existing diffuser bottle, arrange reeds, turn sticks 2-3 times on first day, place in warm environment with good airflow, add or remove reeds to control scent, turn reeds upside down or replace when fragrance weakens. [PARTIAL] Safety Warning For safe use, keep away from open flames and heat sources. See more
